== Notes for [[Item:Q103520|Q103520]] ==

Explorer and Spanish colonizer of the mid-sixteenth century. He was governor of Tucumán between 1580 and 1584. He stood out for having founded the city of Salta, capital of the current province of Salta, in northwestern Argentina.

https://es.wikipedia.org/wiki/Hernando_de_Lerma https://www.elintransigente.com/salta/2015/4/16/acerca-fundacion-ciudad-salta-309053.html

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000076931270305

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
